detail.description: José Azócar grounds into a force out, pitcher Ryan Watson to second baseman Marcelo Mayer. Jorge Mateo to 3rd. Mike Yastrzemski out at 2nd. José Azócar to 1st.
José Azócar singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Nick Sogard.
José Azócar flies out to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
José Azócar doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran.
José Azócar doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
José Azócar singles on a ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin. José Azócar to 2nd. José Azócar advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Caleb Durbin.
José Azócar grounds into a force out, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Marcelo Mayer. Sandy León out at 2nd. José Azócar to 1st.
José Azócar singles on a line drive to left fielder Ian Happ. Sandy León to 2nd.
José Azócar grounds out, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.
José Azócar grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Christopher Morel.
José Azócar flies out to right fielder Owen Caissie.
José Azócar grounds out, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield.
José Azócar singles on a ground ball to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez.
